_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox swept at Fenway by Twins, now 8-17 at home with worst home record in MLB
items.snark: Getting swept at home twice before Memorial Day is a vibe, if that vibe is sadness mixed with expensive parking.

items.headline: Reality check: Red Sox are 22-30, tied for wild card spot 3.5 games out despite disaster
items.snark: Being in the playoff race at 22-30 says more about the AL being cooked than the Sox being good.

items.headline: Red Sox have lost their way at Fenway Park, swept twice at home already in 2026
items.snark: America's Most Beloved Ballpark is currently a house of horrors and overpriced Fenway Franks.

items.headline: Twins complete sweep with 6-5 win as Kiner-Falefa thinks he hit walk-off, gets doubled up instead
items.snark: Thought you went yard in the rain but hit the wall and got thrown out at home, a Red Sox 2026 memoir.
